# Brahma Sūtras

*[Bādarāyaṇa](../philosophers/badarayana.md) · *Brahmasūtra**

The founding text of Vedānta, attributed to Bādarāyaṇa (around the start of the common era), it condenses into elliptical aphorisms the teaching of the Upaniṣads on brahman. Its commentaries, above all Śaṅkara's, gave rise to the major schools of Vedānta.
